summary: Verified football field dimension fix (8.33% end zones) across all field visualization components. All 6 components correctly use END_ZONE_PERCENT = (10/120)*100 = 8.33%. Visual testing confirmed field displays correctly in both Simple Mode and Advanced Mode.
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 field components verified to use correct 8.33% end zone width
context_for_next_testing_agent: Football field dimension fix verified. All field components use correct 8.33% end zone width (10 yards / 120 yards total). Demo football game accessible at /demo/football with Simple Mode and Advanced Mode options.

1_FootballField_component.visual_verification: End zones visible on both sides with team colors, yard lines correctly positioned

2_FieldViewDialog.usage: Regular play field view for tracking yardage
